\tzpentry{ID3332}{Berry-Phase Angular Velocity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3332 introduces Berry-Phase Angular Velocity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} H_m( \Omega, t) = \exp \left[i \left( \omega_m t + \Phi_{ \text{Berry}}^{(m)} + \Phi_{ \text{Sagnac}}^{(m)}( \Omega) \right) \right] \end{equation}
